coreTruthSet.description: Group formation and inter-group distance operate as governance signals; spacing itself carries political meaning.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: The spacing between groups mattered most ... The distance itself held meaning.

coreTruthSet.description: Assembly uses multiple low controlled fires instead of a single center, distributing attention and reducing singular authority cues.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Not one central flame. Many. Each low. Each controlled.

coreTruthSet.description: The gathering site is framed as shared, held ground rather than proprietary territory, enabling multi-group coexistence.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: The land did not belong to anyone. That was why it held them all.

coreTruthSet.description: Environmental softening (smoke diffusion, layered sound) is treated as procedural delay, making immediate clarity intentionally unavailable.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Clarity was not meant to come quickly here.

coreTruthSet.description: Multiple unmarked but visible paths indicate adaptive network memory across regular, occasional, and seasonal routes.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Paths entered from every direction ... Not marked ... But visible.

settingAnchors.name: Held Multi-Group Clearing
settingAnchors.description: Slightly raised convergence ground with distributed entry paths and layered fire/smoke conditions for negotiated assembly.

continuityConstraints.title: Spacing as Diplomatic Language
continuityConstraints.text: Inter-group distance, intra-group formation, and entry posture function as pre-verbal diplomatic language in assembly spaces.

continuityConstraints.title: Distributed Attention Management
continuityConstraints.text: Multiple low fires and non-dominant sound layering keep attention distributed, preventing premature center capture.

continuityConstraints.title: Entry Pause Awareness Protocol
continuityConstraints.text: Legitimate entry requires pause-and-read behavior at the edge, prioritizing environmental and relational awareness over immediacy.

openResearchGaps.title: What practical rules govern placement and count of low fires in multi-group gatherings?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to keep assembly staging materially coherent.

openResearchGaps.title: How do seasonal path changes alter who can arrive, when, and with what relational leverage?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to connect route ecology with gathering power dynamics.

openResearchGaps.title: What spacing thresholds map to alliance, neutrality, and tension states in these assemblies?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for consistent spatial coding of political relations across scenes.
